issues.summary: color-contrast: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA min
issues.html_snippet: <input class="button--small button button--primary js-form-submit form-submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit" type="submit" id="edit-submit" name="op" value="Apply to selected items">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.24 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3371ff, font size: 9.5pt (12.64px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.suggested_fix: Check foreground/background color combinations. Ensure ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for normal text, ≥ 3:1 for large text (18pt or 14pt bold). Update the relevant CSS file.
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "color-contrast" on selector: #edit-submit
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: "Select all rows" checkbox is labeled only by its title attribute
issues.selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
issues.html_snippet: <input type="checkbox" class="form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" title="Select all rows in this table">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Checkbox has a visible or visually-hidden <label>, or aria-label
issues.actual_behaviour: input[title="Select all rows in this table"] — title is the sole label source
issues.suggested_fix:
Replace the title-only label with aria-label:

<!-- Before (broken) -->
<input type="checkbox" title="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

<!-- After (fixed) -->
<input type="checkbox"
  aria-label="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "label-title-only" on selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: "Select all rows" checkbox is labeled only by its title attribute
issues.selector: .gin--sticky-table-header > thead > tr > .select-all.gin--sticky-bulk-select.views-field-node-bulk-form > .form-checkbox.form-boolean[title="Select all rows in this table"]
issues.xpath: //*[contains(@class,"gin--sticky-table-header > thead > tr > .select-all.gin--sticky-bulk-select.views-field-node-bulk-form > .form-checkbox.form-boolean[title="Select all rows in this table"]")]
issues.html_snippet: <input type="checkbox" class="form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" title="Select all rows in this table">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element
issues.template_hint: Node template
issues.expected_behaviour: Checkbox has a visible or visually-hidden <label>, or aria-label
issues.actual_behaviour: input[title="Select all rows in this table"] — title is the sole label source
issues.suggested_fix:
Replace the title-only label with aria-label:

<!-- Before (broken) -->
<input type="checkbox" title="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

<!-- After (fixed) -->
<input type="checkbox"
  aria-label="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()

Look for rule "label-title-only" on selector: .gin--sticky-table-header > thead > tr > .select-all.gin--sticky-bulk-select.views-field-node-bulk-form > .form-checkbox.form-boolean[title="Select all rows in this table"]
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Local task tab headings (#primary-tabs-title) are outside any landmark region
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: The <h2> heading is inside the <nav> it labels, or the <nav> itself is inside a landmark
issues.actual_behaviour: <h2 id="primary-tabs-title"> is a sibling of <nav>, and the nav may be outside main/aside/etc.
issues.suggested_fix:
Move the heading inside the
it labels: {# Before #}

{{ 'Primary tabs'|t }}

…
{# After — h2 moves inside nav #}

{{ 'Primary tabs'|t }}

…
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/user/login
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "region" on selector: #primary-tabs-title
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: region: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
issues.html_snippet: • Add content
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure all visible content is inside a landmark element (<main>, <nav>, <aside>, <header>, <footer>). Check page.html.twig and block placement.

Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "region" on selector: .top-bar__actions
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js

issues.summary: Homepage has no <h1> heading — screen reader users cannot identify page topic
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.drupal_file:
core/themes/olivero/templates/layout/page--front.html.twig
    Site configuration (site name / front page node)
issues.expected_behaviour: Every page contains exactly one <h1> that identifies the page
issues.actual_behaviour: Olivero front page renders no <h1>; the site name in the header is not an <h1>
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/
Open browser DevTools and run: axe.run()
Look for rule "page-has-heading-one" on selector: html
Or run: cd core && yarn test:a11y:playwright && node tests/playwright/scripts/analyze-patterns.js
